title: API responses are malformed — not valid JSON
body:
When hitting any endpoint, the response body looks like a Python dict repr (single quotes, True/False instead of true/false) instead of proper JSON.

Steps to reproduce:
1. Start the server
2. `curl http://localhost:8000/`
3. Observe response has single quotes

Expected: Valid JSON
Actual: Python dict string representation

title: Add health check endpoint
body:
We need a `/health` endpoint that returns `{"status": "ok"}` for load balancer health checks.

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /health returns 200
- Response body is `{"status": "ok"}`

title: Server crashes when POST body is empty
body:
Sending a POST to `/api/echo` with no body causes an unhandled exception.

```
Traceback:
  File "server.py", line 95, in do_POST
    content_length = int(self.headers['Content-Length'])
TypeError: int() argument must be a string, a bytes-like object or a real number, not 'NoneType'
```

title: Add rate limiting to API endpoints
body: To prevent abuse, we should add basic rate limiting. Start with 100 requests per minute per IP.

title: Document API endpoints in README
body:
The repo has no README.md. We need documentation covering:
- Available endpoints
- Request/response format
- How to run the server locally
